problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Carbon. Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
